creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May 24 14:12:37 2014
New Revision: 355035
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355035
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355035/

Log:
  - Update to 0.073
  - Add LICENSE
  - Use DISTNAME instead of DISTVERSION
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Object-Enum/Changes
  PR:		ports/190060
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/distinfo
  head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/Makefile	Sat May 24 14:12:32 2014	(r355034)
+++ head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/Makefile	Sat May 24 14:12:37 2014	(r355035)
@@ -2,15 +2,18 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Object-Enum
-PORTVERSION=	0.07.2
-DISTVERSION=	${PORTVERSION:C/\.(.)$/\1/}
+PORTVERSION=	0.07.3
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:R}${PORTVERSION:E}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Replacement for if ($$foo eq 'bar')
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-Sub-Install>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Install \
 		p5-Sub-Exporter>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Sub-Exporter \
 		p5-Class-Data-Inheritable>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Data-Inheritable \

--- head/devel/p5-Object-Enum/distinfo	Sat May 24 14:12:32 2014	(r355034)

   # it can't be yellow or green
